extortion.description: [AI generated] Amsino International Inc. is a US-based medical devices manufacturer focusing on developing, manufacturing, and marketing high-quality, advanced medical products. The company offers a broad range of products including infusion & syringe pumps, respiratory therapy products, enteral feeding products, urine bags & catheters, and more. It aims to enhance patient care and improve healthcare efficiency on a global scale, with a presence in over 85 countries.
